MULTIMETER, 80 SERIES - True RMS, High Resolution
DIGITAL MULTIMETER, WIRELESS - Capacitance, Frequency, Temperature, True RMS
FLUKE CONNECT™, DIGITAL INSULATION MULTIMETER, WIRELESS

specs.measurements: AC/DC Voltage, DC Millivolts, AC/DC Milliamps, Resistance (Ω), Continuity, Capacitance, Diode Test, Temperature, Min/Max, Frequency (Hz)

specs.protection: Category III 600V with transient overvolt protection to 6 kV

specs.includes: Fluke 116 Multimeter with temp, 323 True RMS clamp meter, TL175 hard point test lead set, ToolPak magnetic meter hanger, Flexible cuff pipe clamp thermocouple, 80AK-A thermocouple adapter, 80BK temperature probe, C115 deluxe soft case, Batteries

specs.measurements: AC DC Voltage, AC DC Current, Continuity, Resistance, Diode Test and Capacitance

specs.includes: Fluke 116 Multimeter with Temperature, 62MAX+ Infrared Thermometer, TL175 hard point test lead set, ToolPak magnetic meter hanger, Flexible cuff pipe clamp thermocouple, 80PK-11 Velcro Pipe Clamp thermocouple, 80BK temperature probe, 80AK-A thermocouple adapter, C115 deluxe soft carrying case, Batteries

description: Fluke Connect™, HVAC System Service Kit

specs.includes: FLK3000FC Series Wireless Multimeter, FLKA3000FC Wireless AC Current Clamp Module, FLKT3000FC Thermocouple Thermometer, TL175 Test Leads, AC175 Alligator Clips, 80PK1 K-Type Bead Thermocouple, Magnetic hanging strap
